name: Wintermarked Lifeward Cuirass
issues: Equip bonus description: screenshot reads '+0.55% Power and +0.35% Critical Severity' per stack vs DB '+0.55% Power and +0.55% Critical Severity'
Equip bonus description: screenshot reads 'Max 10 Stacks: +5.5% Power and +3.5% Critical Severity' vs DB '+5.5% Power and +5.5% Critical Severity'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Unbroken Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: For each second you are at maximum health, gain +0.55% Power and +0.55% Critical Severity. Each second at less than maximum health, you lose 3 stacks. Max 10 Stacks: +5.5% Power and +5.5% Critical Severity.

name: Enchanted Depthforged Greaves
issues: Equip bonus description says '3.75% Awareness and Deflect' but screenshot shows '3.8% Awareness and Deflect while at full health'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Critical Resilience
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 3.75% Awareness and Deflect while at full health. These bonuses decrease relative to your missing health. Currently: 3.8% Awareness and 3.8% Deflect.

name: Frostbound Hearthhood
issues: Equip bonus description stores '1.008' and '5.04%' as if percent values, but screenshot clearly shows integer ratings: '1,008 Outgoing Healing and Forte' and 'Max 5 Stacks: 5,041 Outgoing Healing and Forte' — these are rating values, not percent

dbEquipBonuses.name: Novice's Mercy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1.008 Outgoing Healing and Forte. Max 5 Stacks: 5.04% Outgoing Healing and Forte.

name: Frostbound Warhood
issues: Equip bonus name: DB stores 'Surging Empathy' but screenshot shows 'Surging Precision'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Surging Empathy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1,320 Critical Severity and Accuracy. Max 5 stacks: 6,600 Critical Severity and Accuracy.

name: Frostsilver Ring of Initiative
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Maiden's Advantage', DB stores 'Vanguard's Assurance'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Vanguard's Assurance
dbEquipBonuses.description: You gain 6% Combat Advantage. When in combat with 2 or more enemies, you also gain 3.25% Power.

name: Rimetouched Coil of Wrath
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Divine Blessing (Lesser)', DB stores 'Divine Blessing (Cesser)' (typo in DB)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Divine Blessing (Cesser)
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Forte, up to a max of 4%. Currently: 4% Forte.

name: Rimetouched Ring of Initiative
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Brute's Might', DB stores 'Brave Warden'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Brave Warden
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you are 25 or closer to your target, your Power is increased by 5%.

name: Snowbound Band of Faith
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Heroic Tactics', DB stores 'Inner Strength'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Inner Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, your Power is increased by 14,475.
